---
title: "Thesis Graph Drafts"
format:
  docx:
    fig-pos: "H"
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r, load packages and load up working directory}

library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(Rmisc)
library(rstatix)
library(tidyr)
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(lme4)
library(stringr)
#install.packages("readxl")
library(readxl)

knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = 'C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\data')
```

```{r, cleaning data}
# load data
sed_thesis<- read.csv("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\data\\thesis_sed.csv")

sed_usgs <- read.csv("C:\\Users\\savan\\OneDrive - San Francisco State University\\ProjectData\\GitHub\\DepositionSFB\\data\\usgs_SFB_sediment_pad_data.csv")

str(sed_usgs)

str(sed_thesis)
               

```

```{r, cleaning data thesis}

# Clean whitespace from character columns only
sed_thesis$Season   <- str_replace_all(sed_thesis$Season, " ", "")
sed_thesis$Dist <- str_replace_all(sed_thesis$Dist, " ", "")
sed_thesis$Tran <- str_replace_all(sed_thesis$Tran, " ", "")
sed_thesis$Year     <- str_replace_all(sed_thesis$Year, " ", "")
sed_thesis$Month    <- str_replace_all(sed_thesis$Month, " ", "")
sed_thesis$Site    <- str_replace_all(sed_thesis$Site, " ", "")
sed_thesis$Replicate    <- str_replace_all(sed_thesis$Replicate, " ", "")

# Convert types
sed_thesis$Flux     <- as.numeric(sed_thesis$Flux)
sed_thesis$Flux     <- round(sed_thesis$Flux)
sed_thesis$Year     <- as.character(sed_thesis$Year)
sed_thesis$Dist <- as.numeric(sed_thesis$Dist)

str(sed_thesis)

```

```{r,cleaning data usgs}

# Clean whitespace from character columns only
sed_usgs$Season   <- str_replace_all(sed_usgs$Season, " ", "")
sed_usgs$Dist <- str_replace_all(sed_usgs$Dist, " ", "")
sed_usgs$Tran <- str_replace_all(sed_usgs$Tran, " ", "")
sed_usgs$Year     <- str_replace_all(sed_usgs$Year, " ", "")
sed_usgs$Month    <- str_replace_all(sed_usgs$Month, " ", "")
sed_usgs$Site    <- str_replace_all(sed_usgs$Site, " ", "")
sed_usgs$Replicate    <- str_replace_all(sed_usgs$Replicate, " ", "")

# Convert types
sed_usgs$Flux     <- as.numeric(sed_usgs$Flux)
sed_usgs$Flux     <- round(sed_usgs$Flux)
sed_usgs$Year     <- as.character(sed_usgs$Year)
sed_usgs$Dist <- as.numeric(sed_usgs$Dist)

str(sed_usgs)
```

```{r, double check variables}

unique(sed_usgs$Site)
unique(sed_thesis$Site)

```

```{r, statistics thesis}

#within all the data
sed_thesis_mean <- mean(sed_thesis$Flux, na.rm = TRUE)
sed_thesis_mean
sed_thesis_max  <- max(sed_thesis$Flux, na.rm = TRUE)
sed_thesis_max
sed_thesis_min  <- min(sed_thesis$Flux, na.rm = TRUE)
sed_thesis_min
sed_thesis_sd <-sd(sed_thesis$Flux, na.rm =TRUE)
sed_thesis_sd

#sed_stats_site <- sed_thesis %>%
 # group_by(Site) %>%
 # summarise(
   # mean = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
   # max  = max(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
  #  min  = min(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
   # sd   = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE))
#sed_stats_site
```

```{r, statistics usgs}


#within all the data
sed_usgs_mean <- mean(sed_usgs$Flux, na.rm = TRUE)
sed_usgs_mean
sed_usgs_max  <- max(sed_usgs$Flux, na.rm = TRUE)
sed_usgs_max
sed_usgs_min  <- min(sed_usgs$Flux, na.rm = TRUE)
sed_usgs_min
sed_usgs_sd <-sd(sed_usgs$Flux, na.rm =TRUE)
sed_usgs_sd

#sed_stats_site <- sed_usgs %>%
 # group_by(Site) %>%
 # summarise(
   # mean = mean(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
   # max  = max(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
  #  min  = min(Flux, na.rm = TRUE),
   # sd   = sd(Flux, na.rm = TRUE))
#sed_stats_site

```

```{r, graphs usgs}

sed_space_usgs <-ggplot(data=sed_usgs, aes(x=Dist, y=Flux, color=Site)) +
  geom_point() + geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) + theme_minimal() +
 coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 357)) + facet_wrap(~ Season) + 
  labs(x = "Distance (meters)", y = "Log Flux of Sediment Deposition (g/m^2)", 
       title = "Sediment Deposition Rates Across Distances Per Site Per Season")
sed_space_usgs

sed_time_usgs <-ggplot(data=sed_usgs, aes(x=Dist, y=Flux, color=Site)) + geom_point() + geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) + theme_minimal() +
 coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 357)) + facet_wrap(~Month) +
  labs(x = "Distance (meters)", y = "Log Flux of Sediment Deposition (g/m^2)", 
       title = "Sediment Deposition Rates Across Distances Per Site Per Month")
sed_time_usgs

sed_year_usgs <- ggplot(sed_usgs, aes(x= Season, y= Flux, color= Site)) +geom_point() + facet_wrap(~Year)
sed_year_usgs

sed_phase_site_usgs = ggplot(sed_usgs, aes(x = Dist, y = Flux, color = Month)) +
  facet_wrap("Site") +
  geom_point(position = "dodge") +
  scale_y_log10() + 
   geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "Distance (meters)", y = "Log Flux of Sediment Deposition (g/m^2)") 
sed_phase_site_usgs

sed_SitesRep_usgs <- ggplot(sed_usgs, aes(x= Replicate, y=Flux, color = Site)) +geom_point() + geom_boxplot()
sed_SitesRep_usgs

sed_season_usgs = ggplot(sed_usgs, aes(x = Dist, y = Flux, color = Site)) +
  facet_wrap("Month") +
  geom_point(position = "dodge") +
  scale_y_log10() +
   scale_x_log10() + 
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "Distance (meters)", y = "Log Flux of Sediment Deposition (g/m^2)") 
sed_season_usgs

sed_Dist_usgs = ggplot(sed_usgs, aes(x = Dist, y = Flux, color = Site)) + 
  geom_point(aes(x = Dist, y = Flux), data = sed_usgs, position = position_jitter(w = 0.05, h = 0)) +
  scale_y_log10() + 
   scale_x_log10() +
   geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "Distance (meters)", y = "Log Flux of Sediment Deposition (g/m^2)", 
       title = "Sediment Deposition Rates Across Distances")
sed_Dist_usgs
  
```

```{r, graphs thesis}

sed_space_thesis <-ggplot(data=sed_thesis, aes(x=Dist, y=Flux, color=Site)) +
  geom_point() + geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) + theme_minimal() +
 coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 357)) + facet_wrap(~ Season) + 
  labs(x = "Distance (meters)", y = "Log Flux of Sediment Deposition (g/m^2)", 
       title = "Sediment Deposition Rates Across Distances Per Site Per Season")
sed_space_thesis

sed_time_thesis <-ggplot(data=sed_thesis, aes(x=Dist, y=Flux, color=Site)) + geom_point() + geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) + theme_minimal() +
 coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 357)) + facet_wrap(~Month) +
  labs(x = "Distance (meters)", y = "Log Flux of Sediment Deposition (g/m^2)", 
       title = "Sediment Deposition Rates Across Distances Per Site Per Month")
sed_time_thesis

sed_year_thesis <- ggplot(sed_thesis, aes(x= Season, y= Flux, color= Site)) +geom_point() + facet_wrap(~Year)
sed_year_thesis

sed_phase_site_thesis = ggplot(sed_thesis, aes(x = Dist, y = Flux, color = Month)) +
  facet_wrap("Site") +
  geom_point(position = "dodge") +
  scale_y_log10() + 
   geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "Distance (meters)", y = "Log Flux of Sediment Deposition (g/m^2)") 
sed_phase_site_thesis

sed_SitesRep_thesis <- ggplot(sed_thesis, aes(x= Replicate, y=Flux, color = Site)) +geom_point() + geom_boxplot()
sed_SitesRep_thesis

sed_season_thesis = ggplot(sed_thesis, aes(x = Dist, y = Flux, color = Site)) +
  facet_wrap("Month") +
  geom_point(position = "dodge") +
  scale_y_log10() +
   scale_x_log10() + 
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "Distance (meters)", y = "Log Flux of Sediment Deposition (g/m^2)") 
sed_season_thesis

sed_Dist_thesis = ggplot(sed_thesis, aes(x = Dist, y = Flux, color = Site)) + 
  geom_point(aes(x = Dist, y = Flux), data = sed_thesis, position = position_jitter(w = 0.05, h = 0)) +
  scale_y_log10() + 
   scale_x_log10() +
   geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "Distance (meters)", y = "Log Flux of Sediment Deposition (g/m^2)", 
       title = "Sediment Deposition Rates Across Distances")
sed_Dist_thesis
  
  
```

```         
```

```{r, ramped site graphs}

sed_ramped <- sed_thesis %>% 
  filter(Site %in% c("Buck'sLanding", "SanPablo"))

sed_ramped_basic = ggplot(sed_ramped, aes(x = Dist, y = Flux, color = Site)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "Ramped Site Sediment Deposition Across Transects",
       x = "Distance (m)",
       y = "Flux (g/m^2)") +
    scale_x_log10(breaks = c(0.5,2,6,12,18,24,48)) +
scale_y_log10() + 
  geom_smooth(method = "loess") + 
  theme_minimal()

sed_ramped_basic

```

```{r}

sed_B <- sed_thesis %>% 
  filter(Site %in% c("Buck'sLanding"))
table(sed_B$Site)
```

```{r}
sed_C <- sed_thesis %>% 
  filter(Site %in% c("CorteMadera"))
table(sed_C$Site)
```

```{r}
sed_G <- sed_thesis %>% 
  filter(Site %in% c("GiantMarsh"))
table(sed_G$Site)
```

```{r, Individual Sites}

sed_S <- sed_thesis %>% 
  filter(Site %in% c("SanPablo"))
table(sed_S$Site)


```

```{r, sites over time}

sed_B_time <-ggplot(data=sed_B, aes(x=Dist, y=Flux)) + geom_point() + geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) + theme_minimal() +
 coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 357)) + facet_wrap(~Month) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess") +
  labs(x = "Distance (meters)", y = "Log Flux of Sediment Deposition (g/m^2)", 
       title = "Sediment Deposition Rates Across Distances At Buck's Landing Per Month")
sed_B_time

sed_C_time <-ggplot(data=sed_C, aes(x=Dist, y=Flux)) + geom_point() + geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) + theme_minimal() +
 coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 357)) + facet_wrap(~Month) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess") + 
  labs(x = "Distance (meters)", y = "Log Flux of Sediment Deposition (g/m^2)", 
       title = "Sediment Deposition Rates Across Distances At Corte Madera Per Month")
sed_B_time

sed_G_time <-ggplot(data=sed_G, aes(x=Dist, y=Flux)) + geom_point() + geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) + theme_minimal() +
 coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 357)) + facet_wrap(~Month) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess") +
  labs(x = "Distance (meters)", y = "Log Flux of Sediment Deposition (g/m^2)", 
       title = "Sediment Deposition Rates Across Distances At Giant Marsh Per Month")
sed_B_time

sed_S_time <-ggplot(data=sed_S, aes(x=Dist, y=Flux)) + geom_point() + geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) + theme_minimal() +
 coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 357)) + facet_wrap(~Month) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess") + 
  labs(x = "Distance (meters)", y = "Log Flux of Sediment Deposition (g/m^2)", 
       title = "Sediment Deposition Rates Across Distances At San Pablo Per Month")
sed_B_time
```

```{r, scarped site development}

sed_scarped <- sed_thesis %>% 
  filter(Site %in% c("CorteMadera", "GiantMarsh"))
table(sed_scarped$Site)

unique(sed_thesis$Site)
```

```{r, scarped site graphs}


sed_scarped_basic <- ggplot(sed_scarped, aes(x = Dist, y = Flux, color = Site)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "Scarped Site Sediment Deposition Across Transects",
       x = "Distance (m)",
       y = "Flux (g/m^2)") + 
  scale_x_log10(breaks = c(0.5,2,6,12,18,24,48)) +
scale_y_log10() +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess") + 
  theme_minimal()

print(sed_scarped_basic)

```

```{r, change the units of flux to g/cm^2 from g/m^2}

sed_thesis_cm <- sed_thesis %>%
  mutate(Flux = na_if(Flux, "N/A"),  # replace "N/A" text with true NA
         Flux = as.numeric(Flux),
         Flux_cm2 = Flux / 10000)

sed_usgs_cm <- sed_usgs %>%
  mutate(Flux = na_if(Flux, "N/A"),  # replace "N/A" text with true NA
         Flux = as.numeric(Flux),
         Flux_cm2 = Flux / 10000)

```

```{r, usgs with centimeters}

sed_space_cm <-ggplot(data=sed_usgs_cm, aes(x=Dist, y=Flux_cm2, color=Site)) +
  geom_point() + geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) + theme_minimal() +
 coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 357)) + facet_wrap(~ Season) + 
  labs(x = "Distance (meters)", y = "Log Flux of Sediment Deposition (g/cm^2)", 
       title = "Sediment Deposition Rates Across Distances Per Site Per Season")
sed_space_cm

sed_time_cm <-ggplot(data=sed_usgs_cm, aes(x=Dist, y=Flux_cm2, color=Site)) + geom_point() + geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) + theme_minimal() +
 coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 357)) + facet_wrap(~Month) +
  labs(x = "Distance (meters)", y = "Log Flux of Sediment Deposition (g/cm^2)", 
       title = "Sediment Deposition Rates Across Distances Per Site Per Month")
sed_time_cm

sed_year_cm <- ggplot(sed_usgs_cm, aes(x= Season, y= Flux_cm2, color= Site)) +geom_point() + facet_wrap(~Year)
sed_year_cm

sed_phase_site_cm = ggplot(sed_usgs_cm, aes(x = Dist, y = Flux_cm2, color = Month)) +
  facet_wrap("Site") +
  geom_point(position = "dodge") +
 scale_x_log10(breaks = c(0.5,2,6,12,18,24,48,150)) +
scale_y_log10() +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "Distance (meters)", y = "Log Flux of Sediment Deposition (g/cm^2)") 
sed_phase_site_cm

sed_SitesRep_cm <- ggplot(sed_usgs_cm, aes(x= Replicate, y=Flux_cm2, color = Site)) +geom_point() + geom_boxplot()
sed_SitesRep_cm

sed_season_cm = ggplot(sed_usgs_cm, aes(x = Dist, y = Flux_cm2, color = Site)) +
  facet_wrap("Month") +
  geom_point(position = "dodge") +
  scale_x_log10(breaks = c(0.5,2,6,12,18,24,48,150)) +
scale_y_log10() +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess") +
  labs(x = "Distance (meters)", y = "Log Flux of Sediment Deposition (g/cm^2)") 
sed_season_cm

sed_Dist_cm = ggplot(sed_usgs_cm, aes(x = Dist, y = Flux_cm2, color = Site)) + 
  geom_point(aes(x = Dist, y = Flux), data = sed_usgs_cm, position = position_jitter(w = 0.05, h = 0)) +
  scale_x_log10(breaks = c(0.5,2,6,12,18,24,48,150)) +
scale_y_log10() +
   geom_smooth(method = "loess") +
  labs(x = "Distance (meters)", y = "Log Flux of Sediment Deposition (g/cm^2)", 
       title = "Sediment Deposition Rates Across Distances")
sed_Dist_cm

```

```{r, thesis with centimeters}

sed_space_cm_thesis <-ggplot(data=sed_thesis_cm, aes(x=Dist, y=Flux_cm2, color=Site)) +
  geom_point() + geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) + theme_minimal() +
 coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 357)) + facet_wrap(~ Season) + 
  scale_x_log10(breaks = c(0.5,2,6,12,18,24,48)) +
scale_y_log10() +
  labs(x = "Distance (meters)", y = "Log Flux of Sediment Deposition (g/cm^2)", 
       title = "Sediment Deposition Rates Across Distances Per Site Per Season")
sed_space_cm_thesis

sed_time_cm_thesis <-ggplot(data=sed_thesis_cm, aes(x=Dist, y=Flux_cm2, color=Site)) + geom_point() + geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0.2, alpha = 0.6) + theme_minimal() +
 coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 357)) + facet_wrap(~Month) +
  scale_x_log10(breaks = c(0.5,2,6,12,18,24,48)) +
scale_y_log10() +
  labs(x = "Distance (meters)", y = "Log Flux of Sediment Deposition (g/cm^2)", 
       title = "Sediment Deposition Rates Across Distances Per Site Per Month")
sed_time_cm_thesis

sed_year_cm_thesis <- ggplot(sed_thesis_cm, aes(x= Season, y= Flux_cm2, color= Site)) +geom_point() + facet_wrap(~Year)
sed_year_cm_thesis

sed_phase_site_cm_thesis = ggplot(sed_thesis_cm, aes(x = Dist, y = Flux_cm2, color = Month)) +
  facet_wrap("Site") +
  geom_point(position = "dodge") +
 scale_x_log10(breaks = c(0.5,2,6,12,18,24,48)) +
scale_y_log10() +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "Distance (meters)", y = "Log Flux of Sediment Deposition (g/cm^2)") 
sed_phase_site_cm_thesis

sed_SitesRep_cm_thesis <- ggplot(sed_thesis_cm, aes(x= Replicate, y=Flux_cm2, color = Site)) +geom_point() + geom_boxplot()
sed_SitesRep_cm_thesis

sed_season_cm_thesis= ggplot(sed_thesis_cm, aes(x = Dist, y = Flux_cm2, color = Site)) +
  facet_wrap("Month") +
  geom_point(position = "dodge") +
  scale_x_log10(breaks = c(0.5,2,6,12,18,24,48)) +
scale_y_log10() +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess") +
  labs(x = "Distance (meters)", y = "Log Flux of Sediment Deposition (g/c^2)") 
sed_season_cm_thesis

sed_Dist_cm_thesis = ggplot(sed_thesis_cm, aes(x = Dist, y = Flux_cm2, color = Site)) + 
  geom_point(aes(x = Dist, y = Flux), data = sed_thesis_cm, position = position_jitter(w = 0.05, h = 0)) +
  scale_x_log10(breaks = c(0.5,2,6,12,18,24,48)) +
scale_y_log10() +
   geom_smooth(method = "loess") +
  labs(x = "Distance (meters)", y = "Log Flux of Sediment Deposition (g/cm^2)", 
       title = "Sediment Deposition Rates Across Distances")
sed_Dist_cm_thesis


```

```{r, combined usgs and thesis}

combined_sed <- bind_rows(sed_usgs, sed_thesis)
str(combined_sed)

```

```{r, isolate site c and s}

sitec_time <- combined_sed %>% 
  filter(Site %in% c("CorteMadera"))

sites_time <- combined_sed %>% 
  filter(Site %in% c("SanPablo"))

```

```{r, usgs comparison}

sed_s_time<- ggplot(sites_time, aes(x = Dist, y = Flux, color = Year)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "San Pablo Sediment Deposition \nUSGS Study (2022-2023) and Thesis (2025-2026)",
       x = "Distance (m)",
       y = "Flux (g/m^2)") + 
  geom_smooth(method = "loess") + 
   scale_x_log10(breaks = c(0.5,2,6,12,18,24,48, 150)) +
scale_y_log10() +
  theme_minimal()
sed_s_time

sed_c_time<- ggplot(sitec_time, aes(x = Dist, y = Flux, color = Year)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "Corte Madera Sediment Deposition \nUSGS Study (2022-2023) and Thesis (2025-2026)",
       x = "Distance (m)",
       y = "Flux (g/m^2)") + 
  geom_smooth(method = "loess") + 
  scale_x_log10(breaks = c(0.5,2,6,12,18,24,48)) +
scale_y_log10() +
  theme_minimal()
sed_c_time

```

```{r, basic statistics for distributions of data amongst variables}

usgs_Flux = ggplot(data = sed_usgs) +  geom_histogram(aes(x=Flux), binwidth = 45) 
usgs_year

thesis_Flux = ggplot(data = sed_thesis) + geom_histogram(aes(x=Flux), binwidth = 45)
thesis_Flux

thesis_Flux_box = ggplot(data = sed_thesis) +geom_boxplot(sed_thesis,aes(x=Dist, y = Flux)) 
+facet_wrap("Site") 
+ xlab("Distance")
+ylab("Flux") + 
  theme_classic()
thesis_Flux_box
```

```{r, attempted heat map for sediment}

#usgs_long <- sed_usgs %>%
  #pivot_longer(
    #cols = Site, 
    #names_to = "Site",
    #values_to = "count"
 # )
usgs_sed_heatmap = ggplot((sed_usgs), aes(x = Dist, y = Site, fill = Flux)) + # Map x, y, and fill aesthetics
  geom_tile(color = "black") + # Use geom_tile to create the heatmap, with black borders
  theme_bw() + # Apply a black and white theme to remove the grey background
  coord_equal() + # Ensure tiles are square
  scale_fill_distiller(palette = "Greens", direction = 1) + # Use a colorblind-safe color palette
  geom_text(aes(label = Flux), color = "black") + # Add the count values as text on the tiles
  guides(fill = "none") + # Hide the fill legend since values are printed on the tiles
  labs(title = "Count of flux within site") # Add a title
  usgs_sed_heatmap

```
